Instructions for deploying a Flask app with an ASGI server using WSGI to ASGI middleware.

# Purpose
The content explains how to configure a Flask application to run on an ASGI server by using WSGI to ASGI middleware. It recommends using the `WsgiToAsgi` adapter from the `asgiref` library, which allows the integration of Flask applications with ASGI servers. The adapter wraps the Flask application, enabling it to be served by an ASGI server such as Hypercorn. This setup is necessary to leverage Flask's asynchronous capabilities, as ASGI servers support asynchronous request handling. The example demonstrates how to wrap a Flask app with `WsgiToAsgi` and then serve it using Hypercorn.
